summary: Tested Fighter level-up system overhaul, top stat boxes removal, and dice roller advantage/disadvantage fix. All backend tests passed (9/9). Frontend code review verified all changes are correctly implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: Fighter class features in classFeatures.js correctly include subclasses (Champion, Battle Master, Eldritch Knight) with full feature progressions
Fighter fighting_styles array includes 6 styles: Archery, Defense, Dueling, Great Weapon Fighting, Protection, Two-Weapon Fighting
Fighter resources in classResources.js include indomitable (levels 9/13/17) and superiority_dice (Battle Master only)
LevelUpRequest model in backend correctly accepts fighting_style, subclass, and maneuvers fields
Level-up endpoint in characters.py properly handles Fighter-specific fields
DiceRoller.js correctly implements advantage/disadvantage: Math.max() for advantage, Math.min() for disadvantage (not summing)
Advantage/Disadvantage buttons have correct data-testid attributes and only appear when D20 is selected
Top stat boxes (HP/AC/Init/Speed grid) removed from CharacterSheetFull.js - verified via UI testing
Combat tab still shows HP/AC stat pills as expected
LevelUpWizard.js has Fighter-specific steps for fighting style, subclass, and maneuvers selection
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test characters and campaigns
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fighter level-up system is fully implemented with 20-level progression, fighting styles, subclasses (Champion, Battle Master, Eldritch Knight), Indomitable resource, and maneuver selection for Battle Master. Dice roller advantage/disadvantage bug is fixed - now correctly takes highest/lowest instead of summing. Top stat boxes removed from player page. Previous iterations 64-69 all passed 100%.

dice_roller_advantage_fix.advantage_logic: Math.max() - takes highest of two d20s
dice_roller_advantage_fix.disadvantage_logic: Math.min() - takes lowest of two d20s
